overall.description: A hooded character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountainous landscape at golden hour. The scene features dramatic cloud formations, a snow-capped peak in the distance, and a serene lake below, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic vista

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right
clouds shift allowing more golden sunlight to illuminate the mountain peak

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands still on cliff edge, occasionally shifting weight and looking out at the mountain vista

entered.detail: large mountain peak with snow-covered summit dominating the horizon
calm reflective body of water nestled in the valley below
stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the drop
dense tree cover on the slopes below the cliff
heavy cloud formations with sun rays breaking through

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff overlooking a breathtaking mountain vista during golden hour. A snow-capped peak rises in the distance above a serene lake, while dramatic clouds drift across the sky. Birds occasionally fly through the frame as the warm sunlight shifts subtly with the moving clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze across a breathtaking mountain vista as the golden hour light shifts over a vast landscape. It begins with a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff edge, overlooking a serene lake nestled beneath a distant snow-capped peak. As dramatic clouds drift across the sky, the warm sunlight subtly fluctuates, altering the glow of the surrounding terrain. The scene then expands to include birds flying through the frame, adding a sense of life to the cinematic atmosphere before the camera settles on the horizon.
